calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077, Bailiff: Deputy Chen.

Petitioner: Raymond Hadley, present in pro per.
Witness for the Petitioner: Roosevelt Hemphill, also present.

Respondent: Tete Fumey, present in pro per.

All parties and witnesses were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

The Court addressed Mr. Fumey's response filed on 9/24/12. Mr. Fumey confirmed that he did agree to the orders as requested as indicated in his response. At the conclusion of Mr. Fumey's testimony, the Petitioner's order was Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the following protected persons: Raymond Hadley, and is to stay 3 yards away from Raymond Hadley while at 149 Mason Street, San Francisco.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.

Respondent shall not Contact the person, either directly or indirectly, in any way, including, but not limited to, in person, by telephone, in writing, by public or private mail, by interoffice mail, by e-mail, by text message, by fax, or by other electronic means.

Take any action to obtain the person's address or location.

No Guns or Other Firearms.

Expires: October 3, 2015.

Order signed in open court.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Raymond Hadley (Petitioner). David Maddon (Witness for Mr. Hadley).

The Court advised the Petitioner that it is unable to proceed with the hearing and that no proof of service is filed. The Court further explained the procedure that the Respondent must be served properly. The Petitioner requested for a continuance to effect service. The Court continued the Request for Restraining Orders to October 3, 2012 at 1:30 p.m. in Dept. 204 and signed the Notice of New Hearing Date in open court.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
